ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fire_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fire station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the fire station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the fire station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fire station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the fire station for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the fire station for geolocation */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fire station was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency response type */,
  "response_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency response type (e.g., Fire Suppression, Medical Rescue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emergency response type */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Typical response time for each type of emergency response */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Types of equipment required for each response type */,
  "training_required" TEXT /* Types of training required for each response type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_responses" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emergency response type */,
  "capability" TEXT /* Whether the station is capable of handling the response (YES/NO) */,
  "last_response_date" TEXT /* Date of the last response for each station and response type */,
  "response_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of responses for each station and response type (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each additional service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the additional service (e.g., Public Service Assistance, False Alarm Response) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the additional service */,
  "service_time" TEXT /* Typical duration of each additional service */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Types of equipment required for each additional service */,
  "training_required" TEXT /* Types of training required for each additional service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_services" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the additional service */,
  "offered" TEXT /* Whether the station offers the service (YES/NO) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service for each station and service type */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of services for each station and service type (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, station officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that responded */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emergency response type */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time of the response */,
  "response_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the response */,
  "response_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the response (e.g., success, failure, ongoing) */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES emergency_responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that provided the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the additional service */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_time" TEXT /* Time of the service */,
  "service_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the service */,
  "service_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the service (e.g., success, failure, ongoing) */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES additional_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrant_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the inspection */,
  "hydrant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hydrant inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_time" TEXT /* Time of the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "inspection_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrant_inspections_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the investigation */,
  "investigation_date" TEXT /* Date of the investigation */,
  "investigation_time" TEXT /* Time of the investigation */,
  "investigation_result" TEXT /* Result of the investigation (e.g., resolved, ongoing) */,
  "investigation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_safety" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water safety check log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the check */,
  "check_time" TEXT /* Time of the check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., safe, unsafe) */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_safety_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_drops" (
  "drop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical drop log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the drop */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date of the drop */,
  "drop_time" TEXT /* Time of the drop */,
  "drop_result" TEXT /* Result of the drop (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "drop_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the drop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_drops_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoke_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoke program log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the program */,
  "program_date" TEXT /* Date of the program */,
  "program_time" TEXT /* Time of the program */,
  "program_result" TEXT /* Result of the program (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "program_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoke_programs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station tour log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the tour */,
  "tour_date" TEXT /* Date of the tour */,
  "tour_time" TEXT /* Time of the tour */,
  "tour_result" TEXT /* Result of the tour (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  "tour_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_tours_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sand_winter" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sand winter check log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the check */,
  "check_time" TEXT /* Time of the check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., safe, unsafe) */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sand_winter_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bulk_water" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bulk water check log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire station that performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the check */,
  "check_time" TEXT /* Time of the check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., safe, unsafe) */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bulk_water_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES fire_stations ("station_id")
)
